title: Special Talent Examinations Have Started
content:
Announcements

Details

Date: 05 May 2017

Special Talent Examinations Have Started

Special Talent Examinations will be carried out in the Department of Graphics, Faculty of Art and Design.

To apply for preliminary interviews:

Candidates must have a minimum score of 150 in any score type of YGS 2017.

For disabled students, the minimum score is 100 in at least one of YGS scores on condition that they present documentary evidence of their disability (physically handicapped, visually impaired, hearing impaired, autism spectrum disorder).

Faculty of Art and Design

Graphics (with a schorlarship of 50%)

Requirements for application:

The registration for the exam must be done online on our website.

Click here for registration.

ID

*

Stationary to be used in the exam will be provided by our university.

The Special Talent Examinations will be carried out between 10:00-16:00 every weekday.

Important:

Those that fail to apply for registration online or within specified dates and times will be considered to have renounced their rights.
